bonuses.stat: Dealing damage with a fully-charged Heavy Attack creates a 3 meter poison boulder. After 1.2 seconds the boulder rolls forward until it hits an enemy, dealing 1049 Poison damage in a 6 meter area and creating a 6 meter pool of poison for 5 seconds, dealing 730 Poison damage and applying the Poisoned status effect each second. This effect can occur once every 20 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
